_note: An authenticated JSON POST the harness replays against your endpoint to exercise a CORS preflight. The browser sends a preflight OPTIONS first because the request is non-simple (Content-Type: application/json + an Authorization header). This file documents the request BODY shape and carries a clearly-fake demo marker; the CORS check is about the Origin and the preflight response, not the body.
note: CPTK-DEMO-01 — illustrative, not a real record
